text: ‘Elsewhere’; implying evidently that he put himself outside Herod’s jurisdiction. It seems probable that St Luke kept silence about St Peter’s movements out of caution. He may have gone to Rome at this time, but his immediate destination was perhaps Antioch (see Gal. 2.11).
Some of the best Greek manuscripts have ‘returned to Jerusalem’ (that is, after distributing relief to the various districts in Judaea), but this reading is probably erroneous.
